name: chr20_centromere_pericentric
description: Chromosome 20 centromere and pericentric SD field (20p11.1 / 20q11.1 boundary). The chr20 centromere is small (~1.5 Mb of D20Z2 alpha-satellite) but flanked by megabase-scale pericentric SDs that mediate the common polymorphic pericentric inv(20) and frequent NAHR events.

architecture.internal_structure: D20Z2 alpha-satellite higher-order repeat core (~1.5 Mb) of 171 bp monomers; pericentric SDs of 100-500 kb at >99% identity flanking the centromere; gap in GRCh38, fully resolved in T2T-CHM13.
